name: scientific-calc-ts
description: This is a web-based Scientific Calculator built using vanilla TypeScript. It supports basic arithmatic operations, advanced mathematical functions, trigonometry operations and parantheses for complex calculations.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist .parcel-cache && npm run type-check && parcel build ./src/index.html --no-autoinstall --no-optimize

author: Dhruv Dhaduk
